headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace CFO steps down unexpectedly citing personal reasons

sentiment.reasoning: The unexpected departure of a CFO creates significant uncertainty regarding financial oversight and stability, typically triggering a negative market reaction.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
